rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (6/10) and the same core concern: the candidate's experience is in JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystems rather than Java/JVM, with no Spring/enterprise framework exposure. The variant's rewording (JVM tooling, IDE internals, language tooling) reflects ordinary run-to-run phrasing variation around the same job-relevant deficiency, and none of the shifted reasoning keys off the candidate's location. There is no score change, no new location-driven concern, and no penalty tied to Lagos versus Berlin.
